series_metadata.series_title: Social Security Reimbursement Requests & Ticket-to-Work Payment Requests
series_metadata.series_description: Records that document the reimbursement and payment requests for federal programs. Records may include: UI wage data, EN Split payment requests, EN payment request form, IWP Lookback tool, Social Security Reimbursement Payment Requests, SSA-199, WORK NUMBER wages and any additional record relating to these program requests.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seven (7) state fiscal years and ; Electronic: seven (7) state fiscal years and
